description: Boundary chunking scenario metadata: documents the chunking method of 01_split_at_key_boundary, where chunk_01.json is truncated at a key boundary and chunk_02.json contains the remainder
splitStrategy: split at JSON key boundary (cuts in the middle of a key name)

expect.note: Send chunk_01 then chunk_02 sequentially via receiveTextChunk; final componentTree must be identical to sending the full JSON at once
